name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-42
title: test-tdd-step.py t9 walks past test-green to deprecated, ignoring spec invariant about deprecation criterion
description: test-tdd-step.py t9 (line 182-199) drives the state machine spec -> spec-update -> test-red -> impl -> test-green -> deprecated in one shot. Per spec, the deprecation_criterion gates when a feature can move to deprecated. Going to deprecated in a unit test is fine, but the test exercises a transition that real consumers should never run unless the criterion is met. Either guard the transition in tdd-step.py against missing criterion, or add a note that t9 deliberately exercises the unguarded path.
